[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Russian Police academy female cadets march during a rehearsal for the Victory Day military parade at Dvortsovaya (Palace) Square in St Petersburg, Russia, May 7, 2014. Victory Day, marking the defeat of Nazi Germany, is Russia's most important secular holiday celebrated on May 9. [Photo/icpress.cn]

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2018-05-09
[TITLE]: Sexy female cadets in Soviet-style uniforms steal the show at Putin's Victory Day parades
[METADATA/INTRO]: VLADIMIR Putin’s glamorous female cadets stole the show at Victory Day parades across the country. Wearing skimpy, Soviet-style outfits and high heels, they marched gracefully through city streets alongside Putin’s war machines....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: VLADIMIR Putin’s glamorous female cadets stole the show at Victory Day parades across the country. 
 Wearing skimpy, Soviet-style outfits and high heels, they marched gracefully through city streets alongside Putin’s war machines. 
 With the eyes of the world on Moscow, Putin took the opportunity to showcased his nuclear war-proof Terminator tanks in Red Square. 
 Next-generation Su-57 stealth fighter jets flew overhead – but the city’s policewomen gave audiences and excuse to not to crane their necks. 
 Images from Volgograd showed equally glamorous female cops in mustard jackets and matching skirts strutting through the streets. 
 And in St Petersburg, immaculately dressed emergency workers smiled for the cameras as they marched in perfect formation.
